request_payload.exposure_text: Did you know that countries with mandatory conscription actually have lower military readiness? Studies show that volunteer forces are more effective in modern conflicts. Our national security shouldn't rely on outdated systems that force citizens into service. Let's focus on building a professional, motivated military instead of burdening young people with mandatory service. #NationalSecurity #MilitaryReform
